title: Coffee_XiaoGuan's 3D Mineral
description: Replace the original minerals with 3D minerals
body:
# coffee_xiaoguan-3d-mineral
Replace the original minerals with 3D minerals to make it look better.
This texture pack is a small texture pack. It only changes the original minerals. I hope everyone likes the texture pack I made.
